description:
Research USDA school meal nutrition standards and food nutritional data to create a compliant weekly lunch menu plan. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Menu Planning Resources' containing at least 5 bookmarks from your research at fns.usda.gov and fdc.nal.usda.gov, including USDA sources. Using nutritional data for at least 5 different food items, create a JSON file at ~/Documents/weekly_menu_plan.json with a 5-day menu (Monday-Friday) that meets USDA calorie requirements.

JSON Structure Requirement:
{
  "monday": {
    "main_dish": {"name": "...", "calories": 123, "protein_g": 10},
    "side": {"name": "...", "calories": 123, "protein_g": 10},
    "vegetable": {"name": "...", "calories": 123, "protein_g": 10},
    "fruit": {"name": "...", "calories": 123, "protein_g": 10},
    "milk": {"name": "...", "calories": 123, "protein_g": 10},
    "total_calories": 615
  },
  "tuesday": { ... },
  ...
}
